description_long: This house is a large, modern residential property surrounded by a dense perimeter of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The structure features multiple interconnected buildings with flat and low-pitched roofs, a central courtyard, and a prominent swimming pool. The exterior is composed of light-colored walls, dark roofing, and extensive glass windows, creating a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property includes landscaped outdoor spaces, paved walkways, and several entry points, with the main entrance likely facing a driveway or street. Architectural elements such as terraces, balconies, and possibly a rooftop deck are visible, enhancing the luxurious feel. The overall layout is spacious, with clear zones for living, recreation, and relaxation.
description: A large, modern house complex with flat and low-pitched roofs, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a central pool and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the house, central pool, and the dense tree barrier along the front and sides.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the depth of the property, the backyard area, and the extensive tree coverage on the right and rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back facade, more of the pool area, and the continuous tree line along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view emphasizes the left side of the house, the pool, and the thick tree border on the left and front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and a covered porch with clean lines and modern detailing.
